name: ASUS B650E MAX GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS B650E MAX GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-end AM5 ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 6E, and premium connectivity for gaming and content creation.
